prerequisites: Then went to its School Licences page

testCases.title: Licence name field tooltip shows 60 character limit message
prerequisites: Then went to its School Licences page
steps: Navigate to the Create Licence form
Hover over the tooltip icon next to the Licence Name field
testCases.expectedResult: Tooltip displays the text: "Limit max number of characters to 60."

testCases.title: Error shown when Licence name exceeds 60 characters
prerequisites: Then went to its School Licences page
steps: Navigate to the Create Licence form
Enter a licence name that exceeds 60 characters into the Licence Name field
testCases.expectedResult: Error message "You have exceeded the maximum number of 60 characters for this field." appears below the Licence Name field

testCases.title: Review button is disabled on initial page load
prerequisites: Then went to its School Licences page
steps: Navigate to the Create Licence form
Observe the state of the Review button without filling in any fields

testCases.title: Error shown when a duplicate Entitlement ID is added
prerequisites: Then went to its School Licences page
steps: Navigate to the Create Licence form
Add a valid Entitlement ID
Attempt to add the same Entitlement ID again
testCases.expectedResult: Error message "This Entitlement ID has already been added" is displayed

testCases.title: Warning shown and add entitlement field disabled when 20 Entitlement IDs are added
prerequisites: Then went to its School Licences page
steps: Navigate to the Create Licence form
Add 20 valid Entitlement IDs one by one
expectedResult: AC5a: Warning message "The maximum number of 20 IDs per licence has been reached" is displayed
AC5b: The Add Entitlement ID input field becomes DISABLED

testCases.title: Historical start dates can be selected from the start date field
prerequisites: Then went to its School Licences page
steps: Navigate to the Create Licence form
Click on the Start Date field
Attempt to select a date in the past from the date picker

testCases.title: End date picker disables all dates before the selected start date
prerequisites: Then went to its School Licences page
steps: Navigate to the Create Licence form
Select a start date from the Start Date field
Click on the End Date field
Observe the available dates in the End Date date picker
testCases.expectedResult: All dates prior to the selected start date are disabled in the End Date date picker

testCases.title: Error shown when end date is manually entered earlier than start date
prerequisites: Then went to its School Licences page
steps: Navigate to the Create Licence form
Select a start date from the Start Date field
Manually type an end date that is earlier than the selected start date into the End Date field
testCases.expectedResult: Error message "End date can't be earlier than start date" is displayed

testCases.title: Review button becomes enabled when all required fields are completed
prerequisites: Then went to its School Licences page
steps: Navigate to the Create Licence form
Complete all required fields in the form

testCases.title: Error and tooltip shown when invalid character is entered in Student Limit field
prerequisites: Then went to its School Licences page
steps: Navigate to the Create Licence form
Enter an invalid character (e.g. a letter or special character) into the Student Limit field
Observe the error message below the field and the tooltip icon next to it
expectedResult: AC10a: Error message "Please enter a valid number" is displayed below the Student Limit field

AC10b: Tooltip next to the Student Limit field displays: "Number of active students that can access the course materials. Access continues if the limit is exceeded, but usage will be tracked against the limit you set. The number must be a whole number and can't have decimals, alpha or special characters."
